The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]'s forces '''recaptured''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] control during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
Following the death of his apprentice, [[Stam Reath]], at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] was assigned to retake [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces there, now under the command of [[Zian Finnis]]. He was accompanied by [[Naat Reath]], Stam's sister.

==The battle==
Arriving on the planet [[Echuu Shen-Jon]]'s forces discovered the remains of Separatist forces.They then destroyed a Separatist command center and all of its [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] workers, then crossed a bridge that led to a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] base. With only a few [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s guarding it, the base was quickly destroyed. Jon's forces kept moving forward and destroyed most of what was left of the Separatist forces on Sarapin, and forced the Separatists off the planet.

==Aftermath==
After capturing Finnis, Sarapin was once again in the control of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. Echuu then formally accepted Naat as his new [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].
